text: Acceptance complete: full pytest 250 passed/20 optional skipped; sibling-fmrimod protocol test 1 passed; Ruff, release-check, R parity, docs lint/catalog validation all pass; Quarto rendered 69 pages with executable native-grid examples; NPZ/Parquet/Zarr v3 and Zarr catalog-manifest round trips pass. The library now owns lossless native clocks/support/context and downstream libraries own TR/HRF/design policy.
